notes: 1.Push every opening bracket (,{ [ onto the stack. 2.When a closing Bracket Appears,Check if the Stack is empty or if the top doesn't match. 3.if either condition is true,return false. 4.After processing all Charchters,return true only if the stack is empty

1.Horizontal Scanning is intuitive and easy to explain: assume the first string is the prefix and keep shrinking it until it matches all strings.2.Vertical Scanning is often preferred in interviews because it directly compares characters and can stop immediately at the first mismatch.
Approach (in my own words) 1.Walk through array once. 2.For each number, check if (target - number) already exists in map. 3.If yes, return the two indices. If no, store number -> index in map
1.For each index i, the answer is just nums[nums[i]]. 2.No extra logic, no edge cases — just one pass, direct lookup. 3.rick to remember: (index of index) → ans[i] = nums[nums[i]]

pattern: Array Traversal (Linear Scan) + Adjacent Pair Checking
notes: 1.An array is special if every pair of adjacent elements has different parity.

problem: find Number with even number of digits
